Value: Login error styling not cleared when user begins correcting credentials

After a failed login attempt the application displays red borders on both input fields and an error banner. When the user clicks inside a field and begins typing to correct credentials the error styling does not automatically clear. It only disappears when the user manually clicks the X dismiss button.
2. Enter an invalid username and password
4. Observe red borders on both input fields and the error banner
5. Click inside the Username field and begin typing a correction
6. Observe the state of the red borders and error banner while typing
When the user begins typing in an input field after a failed login attempt the error banner should automatically dismiss and red border styling should clear - providing immediate positive feedback.
Red input borders and error banner remain visible while the user actively types corrections. Error styling only clears when the user manually clicks the X dismiss button.
